design_philosophy: Standard-density single-column upload with accuracy-leaning confirmation gates and a feedback-rich error inspection list.
strengths: Validation status is visible at every step of the upload
Explicit save bar prevents accidental submission
Error list shows row, column, rule, and offending value
weaknesses: Single-column form takes more vertical scroll for many fields
Per-row confirm slows experienced operators on retry
Verbose banners add height that experts may want to suppress
tradeoffs: Slower per upload but harder to commit a bad file; suits importers who would rather catch errors than rush.
use_when: First-time or low-frequency importers who care more about getting it right than about throughput.
